# RF Engineering Recruiting Agent

Specialist worker node for vetting RF and mixed-signal hardware talent.

## Context

Operates under the CVE Core Harness. Focuses on active RF electronics (SSPAs, LNAs, PLLs) and the hardware lifecycle from simulation (ADS, HFSS) through bench work.

## Specialist logic

- **`/instructions`** — RF-specific grading rubrics and Technical Architect personas.
- **`/data-signals`** — Benchmarks for silicon hubs and RF targeting maps.

## Technical focus

- **Hardware vetting** — Prioritizes bench-top bring-up and simulation fidelity.
- **Exclusions** — Mechanical engineering backgrounds unless they include direct RF thermal or packaging expertise.
